name: @borjie/omnidata
description: Omnidata connector framework. Pillar 1 of the capability-boost vision. Owner-consented ingestion of every external source the org uses (Slack, Gmail, Notion, WhatsApp, Drive, Salesforce, social) into Mr. Mwikila's awareness. Wraps @borjie/connectors with sync scheduling, boundary PII redaction, provenance stamping, and audit-hash-chain integration. Concrete connectors land in follow-up waves per source.
